conversations.content: Today we studied the Student Dormitory Public Security and Emergency Incident Response Plan. If a group brawl is found in the dormitory area...
Group brawl in dorms? That's unacceptable! How do you control it immediately?
then the dorm supervisor immediately calls the campus security office, then forcefully intervenes to control the situation on site.
Call security plus forceful control — subdue them first! Any other security hazards?

If it is verified that controlled knives or dangerous weapons are hidden in a dormitory, then the security officer confiscates them on the spot, then conducts a surprise search of the entire dormitory.
Hidden controlled knives? Confiscate plus full dorm search — no mercy! What's the third scenario?

If suspicious outsiders are detected sneaking into the dormitory building to commit crimes, then activate the building's access control anti-tailgate lock, then organize floor monitors to conduct floor-by-floor searches to clear the building.
Outsiders sneaking in — lock access control plus floor-by-floor search, catch the bad guys! When any of these happens, what must ultimately be done?

If any of the above situations occurs, then a full curfew must be imposed on the dormitory building, all visitor access must be suspended, and a public security rectification must be carried out in coordination with the local police station.

think: Student dormitory security & emergency: three anomalies: group brawl → call security + control scene; hiding controlled knives → confiscate + full dorm search; suspicious outsiders sneaking in → anti-tailgate lock + floor-by-floor clearance. Any case → full curfew + suspend visitor access + coordinate with local police station for security rectification.
memory: Student Dormitory Public Security and Emergency Incident Response Plan: If a group brawl is found in the dormitory area, then the dorm supervisor immediately calls the campus security office, then forcefully intervenes to control the situation on site; if it is verified that controlled knives or dangerous weapons are hidden in a dormitory, then the security officer confiscates them on the spot, then conducts a surprise search of the entire dormitory; if suspicious outsiders are detected sneaking into the dormitory building to commit crimes, then activate the building's access control anti-tailgate lock, then organize floor monitors to conduct floor-by-floor searches to clear the building; if any of the above situations occurs, then a full curfew must be imposed on the dormitory building, all visitor access must be suspended, and a public security rectification must be carried out in coordination with the local police station.
